name: mathquest
description: MathQuest — a friendly, offline, interactive math tutor for grades 3–6 with lessons, step-by-step explanations, Common Core alignment, badges and rewards.

scripts.test: node tests/precache.mjs && node tests/css-health.mjs && node tests/smoke.mjs && node tests/smoke-v2.mjs && node tests/pet-quest.mjs && node tests/sprint.mjs && node tests/world.mjs && node tests/mastery.mjs && node tests/hints.mjs && node tests/missions.mjs && node tests/quests.mjs && node tests/flows.mjs && node tests/a11y.mjs && node tests/profiles.mjs
scripts.fuzz: node tools/fuzz.mjs && node tools/fuzz-skills.mjs && node tools/visual-check.mjs
